heading.title: Observability
heading.subtitle: Runtime health, Prometheus metrics, structured logs, and OpenTelemetry readiness for this Arthur MCP instance.

logs.title: Structured logs
logs.detail: JSON log entries on stdout/stderr with request, trace, HTTP, and error fields.

metrics.title: Prometheus metrics
metrics.detail: Node.js defaults, HTTP request metrics, and MCP-specific counters/histograms.

traces.title: OpenTelemetry traces
traces.detail: Optional console or OTLP exporter controlled by ENABLE_TRACING and OTEL_* variables.

correlation.title: Correlation IDs
correlation.detail: x-request-id, x-correlation-id, and trace identifiers are generated or reused.

restricted.view: You do not have permission to view observability.

create.title: New Observability Provider
create.detailsHint: Give a descriptive name so you can identify which tool and environment this entry represents.
create.connectionHint: Enter the tool URL and API key. The key is stored encrypted.
create.reviewHint: Confirm everything looks correct before saving.

placeholder.name: e.g. Grafana Production
placeholder.apiKey: Bearer token or service account key…

hint.apiKeyOptional: Leave empty if the tool is publicly accessible or uses another auth method.
hint.apiKeyProtected: API key is encrypted and cannot be retrieved after saving.
hint.urlRequired: The base URL of your observability tool.
hint.deleteWarning: This will permanently remove the provider configuration.
hint.selfHostedOnly: This shows infrastructure-wide health and metrics for the whole platform, not just your workspace.
hint.environmentReadOnly: You can view and copy these controls, but saving them requires settings management permission.

empty.noProviders: No observability providers yet. Click New provider to add one.

confirm.deleteMessage: This observability provider configuration will be permanently removed.

error.runtimeLoadFailed: Failed to load one or more runtime observability endpoints.
error.environmentLoadFailed: Failed to load saved environment controls.

howToUse.title: How to use
howToUse.step1Desc: Enable metrics, logs, and tracing, and set service metadata in Settings > Observability.
howToUse.step2Desc: Run Prometheus, Grafana, and Tempo with Docker Compose to visualize metrics and traces locally.
howToUse.step3Desc: Confirm that /health, /ready, /live, and /metrics are responding — shown in the Runtime endpoints section above.
howToUse.step4Desc: Register Grafana, Datadog, New Relic, or any other platform as a provider to centralize production monitoring.
